title: Cuneiform Tablet #0716: Old Akkadian Tax Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a tax record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a tax record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Tax Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records tax record matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
